query_result.reasoning: Now I have a comprehensive understanding. Let me also verify the supported accounts count and the paying subscribers count to make sure I have the right numbers.

tool_calls.name: retrieve_information
tool_calls.args: {"prompt":"In {{spacex_s1}}, find the exact count of supported accounts, monthly active users (MAUs), and paying subscribers for X and Grok as of March 31, 2026. Also find the count of Starlink Subscribers as of March 31, 2026. Quote the exact language."}

parsed_args.prompt: In {{spacex_s1}}, find the exact count of supported accounts, monthly active users (MAUs), and paying subscribers for X and Grok as of March 31, 2026. Also find the count of Starlink Subscribers as of March 31, 2026. Quote the exact language.

tool_call.name: retrieve_information
tool_call.args: {"prompt":"In {{spacex_s1}}, find the exact count of supported accounts, monthly active users (MAUs), and paying subscribers for X and Grok as of March 31, 2026. Also find the count of Starlink Subscribers as of March 31, 2026. Quote the exact language."}

parsed_args.prompt: In {{spacex_s1}}, find the exact count of supported accounts, monthly active users (MAUs), and paying subscribers for X and Grok as of March 31, 2026. Also find the count of Starlink Subscribers as of March 31, 2026. Quote the exact language.

tool_output.output:
Based on the provided text, here are the exact counts and language for the requested metrics as of March 31, 2026:

**Supported Accounts and Monthly Active Users (MAUs) for X and Grok:**
"Our integrated AI platforms across Grok and X have over 1.3 billion supported accounts active in the last twelve months ended March 31, 2026, including approximately 550 million MAUs... Of our MAUs, we had approximately 117 million MAUs that used Grok’s AI features as of March 31, 2026."

**Paying Subscribers for X and Grok:**
"As of March 31, 2026, we reached approximately 6.3 million active paid subscribers, which was comprised of approximately 4.4 million X Premium and Premium+ paid subscribers and approximately 1.9 million SuperGrok, SuperGrok Heavy and SuperGrok Lite paid subscribers."

**Starlink Subscribers:**
"As of March 31, 2026, we had approximately 10.3 million Starlink Subscribers..."
